qa_pairs.question: How should I request cloud resources if I need them in more than one location?
qa_pairs.answer: If you need to request cloud resources in more than one location, you will have to make one request for each location.

qa_pairs.question: What is the naming convention for cloud resources on CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: On CCDB, cloud resources follow the convention of 'system-compute-cloud' or 'system-persistent-cloud'.

qa_pairs.question: Which types of virtual machines (VMs) can be selected on the Arbutus, Fir, and Béluga clouds?
qa_pairs.answer: You can select compute or persistent VMs on the Arbutus, Fir, and Béluga clouds.

qa_pairs.question: What types of virtual machines (VMs) are available on the Nibi cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Only persistent VMs can be selected on the Nibi cloud.

qa_pairs.question: What information do cloud resources display regarding virtual machines (VMs)?
qa_pairs.answer: Each cloud resource will only show the specific 'flavours' of VMs available for that particular site.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if I have questions about requesting resources?
qa_pairs.answer: Please email allocations@tech.alliancecan.ca with any questions on how to request resources.
